anti_patterns.title: Six or more web cards compete on one mobile screen
anti_patterns.do_not: Compress a desktop card grid into the phone viewport instead of prioritizing the single task and its immediate state.

anti_patterns.title: Interactive control is smaller than 44 by 44 pixels
anti_patterns.do_not: Size a button, icon button, tap target, or touch target below 44 by 44 pixels and force precision tapping.

anti_patterns.title: Critical status marked as color-only
anti_patterns.do_not: Communicate a critical state with color alone; pair it with readable text, an icon, or a state label.

anti_patterns.title: Required gesture marked as undisclosed
anti_patterns.do_not: Make task completion depend on an undisclosed swipe, press, or precision gesture with no visible cue or alternative control.

anti_patterns.title: Desktop card density squeezed into a phone screen
anti_patterns.do_not: Stack dense web-style cards into a mobile screen instead of prioritizing the immediate task.

anti_patterns.title: Precision-dependent touch targets
anti_patterns.do_not: Require precise taps or undisclosed gestures for controls that need to be reliably discoverable.

anti_patterns.title: Critical status communicated by color alone
anti_patterns.do_not: Make a critical state depend only on a status color without readable text, icon, or label.
